name: BrokenPolicyName
expectedIssue: Invalid policy name element count / naming convention failure.

name: Workstation-Edge-Security-TooFarReview-Baseline-MUX
expectedIssue: Review date exceeds maximum allowed review interval.

name: Workstation-Edge-Security-Smartscreen-IT-MUX
expectedIssue: MUX Audience exists without matching Default policy.

name: Employee-Edge-PlatformIntegration-ExtensionGovernance-Baseline-ADD
expectedIssue: ADD baseline for mixed ADD/MUX conflict.

name: Employee-Edge-PlatformIntegration-ExtensionGovernance-IT-MUX
expectedIssue: Same namespace/setting as ADD policy, but MUX mode.

name: Employee-Edge-Security-Smartscreen-Baseline-MUX
expectedIssue: Same setting also appears in Workstation scope; overlapping user/device scope ownership.

name: Workstation-Edge-UserExperience-Smartscreen-Baseline-MUX
expectedIssue: Same setting owned by different domain/subdomain than Workstation-Edge-Security-Smartscreen.

name: Workstation-Edge-Security-AssignmentIssue-IT-MUX
expectedIssue: Assignment validation target: audience policy assigned to scope group and out-of-scope/empty groups.

name: Workstation-Edge-Security-DefaultExclude-Default-MUX
expectedIssue: Default policy excludes unrelated group and misses actual audience excludes.
